case_title: JUDY MAK VS. DOWNTOWN AUTO CENTER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-27-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT DOWNTOWN AUTO CENTER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-12-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF JUDY MAK IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS WILLIAM CHAN. DEFENDANT DOWNTOWN AUTO CENTER IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ROGEILO RANGEL, USED CAR MANAGER. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-20-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JUDY MAK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOWNTOWN AUTO CENTER IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ROGILLO DTAK BY UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANACE. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. DEFENDANT IS INFORMED AS TO WHERE TO FIND REQUEST FOR ZOOM APPEARANCE PACKET. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT DOWNTOWN AUTO CENTER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,607.96 FILED BY MAK, JUDY AS TO DEFENDANT DOWNTOWN AUTO CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAK, JUDY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DOWNTOWN AUTO CENTER PLAINTIFF PRESENTED NO EVIDENCE THAT THE 1) DEFENDANT DISABLED THE TIRE SENSOR AND 2) THE TIRE SENSOR NOTIFICATION WOULD'VE PREVENTED THE STRUT/SPRINGS FROM FAILING 3) THE PLAINTIFF NEVER HAD THE CARE INSPECTED FROM A THIRD PARTY AFTER THE CAR WAS PURCHASED IN OCTOBER 2019. CASE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $65.00) SERVED MAY-17-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT DOWNTOWN AUTO CENTER

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-12-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JUDY MAK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOWNTOWN AUTO CENTER IS PRESENT IN UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE REPRESENTED BY ROGELIO RANGEL TDAC. HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG ALLOWS THE DEFENDANT ONE LAST CONTINUANCE TO SUBMIT A TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAK, JUDY AS TO DEFENDANT DOWNTOWN AUTO CENTER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2021 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY-10-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)
